positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric pattern featuring interconnected line art of stylized mountains, waves, and celestial bodies (sun, crescent moon, stars). The style should be cohesive line art vector illustration, resembling woodblock print engravings, rendered with thick, continuous black lines and negative space. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, earthy terracotta, and bone white. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and highly balanced, designed as a seamless repeat surface print. Emphasize sharp edges, clean silhouettes, and high contrast against a clean background. Studio lighting, maximum detail, 8k print quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, dirty, grainy, low resolution, cropped, out of frame, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, complex background, realistic photography
